name: Agression Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix until fully blended.
2. Form the mixture into small balls, about 1 to 1 1/2 inches in size.
3. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Gently press a small amount of butter onto the bottom of each cookie ball using a glass.
5. Dip the glass in white sugar and then tap off any excess.
6. Pound the cookies flat with the sugared glass.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 to 12 minutes.
This recipe is ideal when you need to release some frustrations, as the heavy dough requires manual mixing by hand. You may also substitute peanut butter or butterscotch chips, or a combination of both, for the chocolate chips.
